headline: Nordson Corporation Declares Third Quarter Dividend for Fiscal Year 2026
summary: WESTLAKE, Ohio, June 04, 2026--Nordson Corporation (Nasdaq: NDSN) today announced that its Board of Directors declared a fiscal year 2026 third quarter cash dividend in the amount of $0.82 per common share, payable on July 6, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on June 18, 2026.
